name: Access Request — AI Policy Decision via OpenCode

nodes.name: Access Request Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives access requests from Slack /access-request command, JIRA, or ITSM webhook

parameters.name: systemPrompt
parameters.value: You are an IT security policy engine. Evaluate the access request against least-privilege and zero-trust principles. Output strict JSON with: decision (auto_grant | needs_approval | deny), reason (string), riskScore (1-10), entitlements { okta: [], entra: [] }, expiresAt (ISO string or null), and escalateTo (email or null). No commentary outside JSON.

parameters.notes: PolicyAgent uses Gemini + Perplexity for policy reasoning and compliance evaluation
Loops over okta entitlements from AI decision and applies group memberships

parameters.name: systemPrompt
parameters.value: You are an IT audit documentation specialist. Log this access request decision as a structured audit entry in Markdown. Include: requester, system, decision, risk score, AI reasoning, and timestamp.

parameters.name: task
parameters.value: =Access request from {{ $('Extract Request Context').first().json.request.requester.name }} for {{ $('Extract Request Context').first().json.request.access.system }} — {{ $('Extract Request Context').first().json.request.access.permission }}. Decision: {{ $('Parse Policy Decision').first().json.decision.decision }}. Reason: {{ $('Parse Policy Decision').first().json.decision.reason }}. Risk: {{ $('Parse Policy Decision').first().json.decision.riskScore }}/10. Ticket: {{ $('Extract Request Context').first().json.request.metadata.ticketId }}.

meta.description: Evaluates access requests using OpenCode PolicyAgent (Gemini + Perplexity). Routes to auto-grant, manager approval, or deny. Logs all decisions via RunbookAgent.
